segments.text: Unplanned failures drain budgets and teams.

segments.label: B-roll 2 — Keeping track of user access across depa
segments.text: Keeping track of user access across departments eats up hours.

segments.label: B-roll 3 — Manual ai failure predictions grid proce
segments.text: Manual ai failure predictions grid processes take hours, every day.

segments.label: Scene 1 — Digital Twin Cockpit
segments.text: Monitor and manage asset health using real-time KPIs, charts, and diagnostics from a unified cockpit.

segments.label: Scene 2 — Digital Twin Cockpit
segments.text: This cockpit dashboard provides a live overview of crucial equipment metrics like RPM, compressor status, and fault predictions.

segments.label: Scene 3 — Air Handling Control
segments.text: This dashboard feature empowers facility managers to monitor and adjust air handling unit parameters in real time, significantly improving energy efficiency and occupant comfort.

segments.label: Scene 4 — Device Status Dashboard
segments.text: This dashboard provides a real-time overview of connected device health, highlighting device issues by type and severity.

segments.label: Scene 6 — Device Status Dashboard
segments.text: Quickly view real-time health and status of water, cooler, and ice devices across multiple sites.

segments.label: Scene 7 — Device Monitoring Dashboard
segments.text: Quickly assess the operational status of all your field devices with this unified dashboard.

segments.label: Scene 8 — Equipment Overview Dashboard
segments.text: This dashboard provides a comprehensive snapshot of critical equipment metrics, including total runtime, weather, alerts, and maintenance status.

segments.label: Scene 9 — Fault Prediction Panel
segments.text: The Fault Prediction panel lets you select equipment and fault types to instantly view predicted failures, helping your teams preemptively address issues before costly downtime occurs.

segments.label: Scene 10 — Alarm Management Board
segments.text: This dashboard displays real-time alarms categorized by severity and type, allowing teams to swiftly identify and address maintenance, connectivity, and system health issues, minimizing downtime and operational risks.

segments.label: Scene 11 — Digital Twin Cockpit
segments.text: This cockpit view provides live insights into equipment health, pressures, cycles, and RPM.

segments.label: Scene 12 — Predictive Issue Cards
segments.text: This dashboard highlights AI-predicted equipment issues, detailing causes, impact severity, and recommended actions.

segments.label: Scene 13 — Device Management Grid
segments.text: This device management grid enables users to quickly assess the status, connectivity, and last seen times for every device in their network.

segments.label: Benefit Slide — Value Adds
segments.text: User Directory Table: With User Directory Table, your team can quickly find, review, and update any user's access in seconds. Real-Time Alert Panel: With Real-Time Alert Panel, your team can spot and act on every critical incident the moment it appears. Quick User Onboarding: With Quick User Onboarding, your team can add new hires in seconds. Energy and Cost KPIs: With Energy and Cost KPIs, your team can see exactly where energy and money go. Energy and Cost Metrics: With Energy and Cost Metrics, your team can see which devices use the most power — and which cost you extra.

segments.label: Presenter Close
segments.text: Platform turns every data point into a prevention Rheem TotalView — contact us to arrange your live demonstration.
